mapper.update: update t_engine_datasource set name = #{name}, remark = #{remark}, datasource_type = #{datasourceType}, datasource_url = #{url}, test_query = #{testQuery}, username = #{username}, password = #{password}, variable_password = #{variablePassword}, connection_timeout = #{connectionTimeout}, idle_timeout = #{idleTimeout}, max_lifetime = #{maxLifetime}, min_idle = #{minIdle}, max_pool_size = #{maxPoolSize}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
